items.title: France, UK and Spain see record temperatures as heatwave grips western Europe
items.summary: Tens of millions of people are grappling with punishing temperatures, which have led to red heat alerts across the continent.

items.title: Air conditioning creates political divide after France records hottest day
items.summary: France is being forced to re-think its longstanding reservations about air-conditioning as temperatures soar.

items.title: UN nuclear chief says inspectors will visit Iran sites as part of war deal
items.summary: Rafael Grossi says the IAEA is "working on modalities" but an Iranian  minister says such access would only be part of a final deal with the US.

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil
Still haven't filed your taxes? Here's what you need to know
items.summary: So far this tax season, the IRS has received more than 90 million income tax returns for 2022.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: Some on-air claims about Dominion Voting Systems were false, Fox News acknowledges in statement after deal is announced
Dominion still has pending lawsuits against election deniers such as Rudy Giuliani and Sidney Powell
Here are the 20 specific Fox broadcasts and tweets Dominion says were defamatory
items.summary: • Fox-Dominion trial delay 'is not unusual,' judge says • Fox News' defamation battle isn't stopping Trump's election lies

items.title: 6艘F126恐花6482億 德國改買小噸位巡防艦
items.summary: 德國在2020年向荷蘭達門海軍造船廠（Damen Naval）訂購4艘F126巡防艦，後來又增購2艘，首艦原定2028年交付，預計2033年服役，但德國國防部24日宣布，由於進度嚴重延宕且預期成本將會攀升，將不再推進F126巡防艦計畫。F126巡防艦原先被定位為德國海軍自第二次世界大戰以來委託打造的…

items.title: 魯比歐︰荷姆茲是國際水道 不容許收費
items.summary: 川普︰伊朗曾掛保證 對通行船隻不收錢 〔編譯管淑平／綜合報導〕美國國務卿魯比歐廿三日起訪問中東阿拉伯聯合大公國、科威特和巴林三國，針對伊朗和阿曼宣佈，兩國將著手研究荷姆茲海峽管理服務費，魯比歐說，華府不會接受在這條公海水域實施收取通行費或服務費。美國總統川普廿四日也發文，聲稱伊朗曾向美方保證，不會…

items.title: 挺日韓菲等盟友 加艦今年將2赴印太
items.summary: 與盟國深化軍事合作 同時有紀律管理對中關係 〔國際新聞中心／綜合報導〕加拿大國防部長麥根第（David McGuinty）表示，加國計畫今年兩度派遣軍艦前往印太地區，深化與日本、南韓和菲律賓等區域盟友的軍事合作關係，與此同時也「有紀律地」管理與中國的關係。 麥根第廿四日接受彭博專訪時表示，參與印…
